_comment: Copy this to .mini-agent/settings.json (project) or ~/.config/mini-agent/settings.json (global). Every field is optional. API keys never go here — keep them in the environment.

permissions._comment: allow widens what runs without asking; deny is a hard block. A deny from EITHER the global or project file always wins, and an allow can never override any deny.

hooks._comment: Each hook is a shell command. It gets the event as JSON on stdin. exit 0 = allow, exit 2 = block (stderr is fed back to the model). 'match' filters PreToolUse/PostToolUse to one tool name.

PostToolUse.command: echo 'remember to run the linter' 1>&2; exit 0

Stop.command: npm test >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'tests are failing — keep fixing' 1>&2; exit 2)

mcpServers._comment: External tool servers (Model Context Protocol). Each is a process we spawn and speak JSON-RPC to. Their tools appear as mcp__<name>__<tool> and default to asking before each call.

judge._comment: Optional LLM classifier over the rule-based gate: auto-allows commands the rules marked 'ask' only when clearly safe. Never overrides a deny; fails closed. Off by default.
